std_msgs/Header header
bool confirm

ConfigureOutputsKdFreqDeadbandCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
bool confirm
uint16 kd                   # The differential term of the closed-loop control. Default is 10.
uint8 closed_loop_freq      # The frequency of closed-loop corrections in Hz. The default is 60Hz.
float64 error_dead_band     # The size of the dead-band for error correction in units of 0.001". The default is 0.05"

fields.name: kd
fields.comment: The differential term of the closed-loop control. Default is 10.

fields.name: closed_loop_freq
fields.comment: The frequency of closed-loop corrections in Hz. The default is 60Hz.

fields.name: error_dead_band
fields.comment: The size of the dead-band for error correction in units of 0.001". The default is 0.05"

ConfigureOutputsKpKiCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
bool confirm
uint16 kp  # The proportial term of the closed-loop control. Default is 1000.
uint16 ki  # The integral term of the closed-loop control. Default is 1000.

fields.name: kp
fields.comment: The proportial term of the closed-loop control. Default is 1000.

fields.name: ki
fields.comment: The integral term of the closed-loop control. Default is 1000.

ConfigureOutputsPwmFreqCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
bool confirm
uint8 min_pwm_pct   # The minimum motor drive duty cycle in percent (0-100). Default is 20%.

uint16 pwm_freq     # The frequency of the PWM outputs in Hz. Default is 2000Hz.

fields.name: min_pwm_pct
fields.comment: The minimum motor drive duty cycle in percent (0-100). Default is 20%.

fields.name: max_pwm_pct
fields.comment: The maximum motor drive duty cycle in percent (0-100). Default is 90%.

fields.name: pwm_freq
fields.comment: The frequency of the PWM outputs in Hz. Default is 2000Hz.

PositionCmd.raw:

fields.name: position
fields.comment: Position in 0.001" increments.

fields.name: clutch_enable
fields.comment: Disables (false) or enables (true) the built-in clutch after the position has been reached.

fields.comment: Disables (false) or enables (true) the motor after the position has been reached.

ReassignCommandIdCmd.description: Setting this to 0xFFFFFFFF will change the disable_default_command_id flag without affecting any others.
ReassignCommandIdCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
bool confirm
uint8 command_id_index            # The index of the user-defined command ID (1-4) to change.
uint32 user_command_id            # The new user-defined command ID to set. 0xFFFEXX and 0xFF00XX are reserved.
                                  # Setting this to 0xFFFFFFFF will change the disable_default_command_id flag without affecting any others.
bool disable_default_command_id   # Disables (true) or enables (false) the default command ID.

fields.name: command_id_index
fields.comment: The index of the user-defined command ID (1-4) to change.

fields.name: user_command_id
fields.comment: The new user-defined command ID to set. 0xFFFEXX and 0xFF00XX are reserved.

fields.name: disable_default_command_id
fields.comment: Disables (true) or enables (false) the default command ID.

ReassignReportIdCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
bool confirm
uint32 user_report_id     # The new user report ID to use. Values 0xFFFEXX and 0xFF00XX are reserved. Setting this to 0xFFFFFFFF will only change the use_user_report_id flag.
bool use_user_report_id   # Whether to use the user-defined report ID (true) or the default report ID (false).

fields.name: user_report_id
fields.comment: The new user report ID to use. Values 0xFFFEXX and 0xFF00XX are reserved. Setting this to 0xFFFFFFFF will only change the use_user_report_id flag.

fields.name: use_user_report_id
fields.comment: Whether to use the user-defined report ID (true) or the default report ID (false).

fields.comment: Ignored if index_2 is set to REPORT_NONE_INDEX.
